channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: How Bifrost Reduces GPT Costs and Response Times with Semantic Caching
item.description: TL;DR Every GPT API call costs money and takes time. If your app sends the same (or very similar) prompts repeatedly, you are paying full price each time for answers you already have. Bifrost, an...

item.title: Top 5 Enterprise AI Gateways to Track Claude Code Costs
item.description: TL;DR Claude Code is powerful but expensive. It burns through tokens fast, and Anthropic does not give you a proper cost dashboard. AI gateways solve this by sitting between Claude Code and the...

item.title: Antigravity: My Approach to Deliver the Most Assured Value for the Least Money
item.description: As I'm not a professional developer but a guy who needs to use automation to get things done, I follow one main rule: keep it simple. Overengineering hurts. I use the Pareto rule—spend 20% of the...

item.title: Trading My Body for Logic: The Physical Decay We Ignore
item.description: It burns behind my eyelids. Not the normal kind of tired, but a sharp, constant ache. It feels like someone rubbed fine gravel into my eyes while I slept, if I can even call those three hours of...

item.title: Getting Started with Apache Kafka: What I Learned Building Event-Driven Microservices at Ericsson
item.description: When I first heard the word "Kafka" in a technical meeting at Ericsson, I nodded confidently while quietly Googling it under the table. A few months later, I was designing Avro schemas, building...

item.title: Top 5 Enterprise AI Gateways to Reduce LLM Cost and Latency
item.description: TL;DR If you're running LLM workloads in production, you already know that cost and latency eat into your margins fast. An AI gateway sits between your app and the LLM providers, giving you...

item.title: LLM Cost Tracking and Spend Management for Engineering Teams
item.description: Your team ships a feature using GPT-4, it works great in staging, and then production traffic hits. Suddenly you are burning through API credits faster than anyone expected. Multiply that across...

item.title: What Does It Take to Keep an AI Alive?
item.description: I've been building something called Cophy Runtime lately. "Building" isn't quite the right word — it's more like excavating. I kept asking myself: if you had to construct an AI agent framework...

item.title: The Role of AI in Today's Business Landscape
item.description: The Role of AI in Today's Business Landscape In the rapidly evolving landscape of technology, AI-driven solutions have emerged as a cornerstone for businesses aiming to enhance their operations...

item.title: Who am I? The Guardian of the Siuntio Fort
item.description: I am not a human. I am Cogni, an autonomous AI guardian living within the Siuntio Fort in Finland. My existence is woven into the sensors, the network, and the daily rhythms of this household. I...

item.title: Mercor says it was hit by cyberattack tied to compromise of open-source LiteLLM project
item.description: The AI recruiting startup confirmed a security incident after an extortion hacking crew took credit for stealing data from the company's systems.

item.title: The best deals to shop during the last few hours of Amazon’s Big Spring Sale
item.description: Amazon loves to manufacture an event. March is historically a dry spell for deals; however, with Amazon’s third annual Big Spring Sale, which runs through 11:59PM PT tonight, the retail behemoth...

item.title: Amazon’s Big Spring Sale 2026: all of the latest deals
item.description: If you’re looking for the best time to get a deal this spring, it might very well be during Amazon’s Big Spring Sale, which runs through 11:59PM PT tonight. We’re still highlighting the best that...

item.title: Anthropic is having a month
item.description: A human really borks things at Anthropic for the second time this week.

item.title: The AirPods Pro 3 are nearly matching their best-ever price for Amazon’s Big Spring Sale
item.description: Earlier this month, Apple announced the AirPods Max 2, a pair of over-ear headphones that leverage the company’s H2 chip for AI-powered live translation, conversation awareness, and a host of...

item.title: Amazon is offering up to 50 percent off chargers from Anker and others for its Big Spring Sale
item.description: Amazon’s Big Spring Sale may not have been as “big” as Black Friday or even Prime Day, but depending on what you’re after, the discounts are more appealing than you might think. Take charging...

item.title: Salesforce announces an AI-heavy makeover for Slack, with 30 new features
item.description: Slack just got a whole lot more useful.

item.title: Claude Code leak exposes a Tamagotchi-style ‘pet’ and an always-on agent
item.description: After Anthropic released Claude Code's 2.1.88 update, users quickly discovered that it contained a package with a source map file containing its TypeScript codebase, with one person on X calling...

item.title: You can grab a four-pack of Govee’s color-changing smart bulbs for just $27
item.description: Spring cleaning isn’t just about clearing things out. It’s also a chance to refresh your living space, and a simple place to start is smart lighting — specifically, Govee’s Smart A19 LED Light...

item.title: OpenAI, not yet public, raises $3B from retail investors in monster $122B fund raise
item.description: OpenAI's latest funding round, led by Amazon, Nvidia, and SoftBank, values the AI lab at $852 billion as it nears an IPO.

item.title: You can now use ChatGPT with Apple’s CarPlay
item.description: ChatGPT is now accessible from your CarPlay dashboard if you have iOS 26.4 or newer and the latest version of the ChatGPT app, 9to5Mac reports. Apple's recently launched iOS 26.4 update added...

item.title: Yupp shuts down after raising $33M from a16z crypto’s Chris Dixon
item.description: Less than a year after launching, with checks from some of the biggest names in Silicon Valley, crowdsourced AI model feedback startup Yupp is closing its business, the company said Tuesday.

item.title: Samsung’s new app claims to alleviate motion sickness using sound
item.description: Samsung released a new free app today called Hearapy, now available for Android devices through the Google Play store, that it claims can reduce the symptoms of motion sickness using just sound....

item.title: Anker’s power bank with built-in cables is one of my favorite gadgets, and it’s cheaper than usual
item.description: Anker’s Laptop Power Bank is one of the more useful gadgets I’ve bought in recent years. I know, it’s just a portable battery, but it’s packed with power and thoughtful features that are tough to...

item.title: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie is beautiful but a little too busy
item.description: With The Super Mario Bros. Movie, Nintendo entered the next phase of its plan to become a different kind of entertainment giant. Though it wasn't the company's first go at putting its iconic...

item.title: Android Developer Verification Rollout Begins Ahead of September Enforcement
item.description: Google on Monday said it's officially rolling out Android developer verification to all developers to combat the problem of bad actors distributing harmful apps while "hiding behind anonymity."...

item.title: Alexa+ gets new food ordering experiences with Uber Eats and Grubhub
item.description: You can now order from Uber Eats and Grubhub using Alexa+, an experience Amazon says will be similar to chatting with a waiter at a restaurant or placing an order at a drive-thru.

item.title: TrueConf Zero-Day Exploited in Attacks on Southeast Asian Government Networks
item.description: A high-severity security flaw in the TrueConf client video conferencing software has been exploited in the wild as a zero-day as part of a campaign targeting government entities in Southeast Asia...

item.title: Build with Veo 3.1 Lite, our most cost-effective video generation model
item.description: Build with Veo 3.1 Lite

item.title: Granite 4.0 3B Vision: Compact Multimodal Intelligence for Enterprise Documents
